skills.name: Slugger
skills.description: Makes it easier to stun monsters.

skills.name: Sleep Resistance
skills.description: Reduces the duration of sleep.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of sleep by 30%.
Reduces the duration of sleep by 60%.

skills.name: Sleep Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of sleep buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Guard
skills.description: Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding.

levels.description: Very slightly decreases the impact of attacks.
Slightly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
Massively decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.

skills.name: Bleeding Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against bleeding.

skills.name: Tremor Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against ground tremors.

levels.description: Nullifies minor ground tremors and reduces the effects of major ground tremors.
Nullifies minor and major ground tremors.
